evaluated-rejected.note: median_of_episode_medians is the canonical coupling statistic — each episode contributes one value (median of its per-fixation cursor-gaze distances), then median across episodes. Matches scripts/output/followup_peter_leif and the §5 paper language. pooled_fixation_median pools all fixations into one bag, so long episodes dominate — this is the distribution the heatmap visualizes, not the coupling statistic. Cursor position is nearest-in-time to each fixation.
